---
name: Bug report
about: Something is not working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

```php
// Minimal code snippet that demonstrates the problem
$client = new Client(new Config(...));
$client->...
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any exception messages or stack traces.

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| PHP version | e.g. 8.2.0 |
| Package version | e.g. 1.1.0 |
| ClickHouse version | e.g. 24.3 |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |

## Additional context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots that might help diagnose the issue.
